description: Running heavy synchronous work on the main process, freezing every window and the whole application at once.
body: Failure mode: CPU-heavy or synchronous I/O (large file parse, crypto, blocking DB call) runs on the main process, blocking its event loop so all windows stop responding simultaneously. Detection signals: the entire app freezes during an operation, not just one window; main-process profile shows a long synchronous stall; the OS shows the app as not responding. Do not block the main process. Safer fallback: move heavy work to a utility process, worker thread, or renderer, use async APIs, and keep the main process orchestrating so all windows stay interactive.
